positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement featuring abstract nature elements: bioluminescent forest flora, floating geometric mandalas of leaves and ferns, and subtle celestial constellations woven into the background. The composition should be highly graphic and clean, utilizing a limited palette of deep indigo, emerald green, electric teal, and luminous gold accents. The artwork must have a strong, cohesive silhouette suitable for a central print. Focus on clean lines, high contrast, and a detailed, meditative energy. Vector art aesthetic meets glowing neon bioluminescence. Flat graphic style with extreme detail.
negative: blur, messy, noisy, text, signature, logo, watermark, artifact, low resolution, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy, muted colors, poor contrast, writing, debris
